title: PTCG Ladder Replays (collected)
subtitle: Converted value-net training records mined from real Kaggle ladder replays.
description: Private dataset produced by src/collector. Contains value-net training chunks (data_collected_*.npz with arrays X=(N, FEATURE_DIM) and y=(N,)) plus small per-episode metadata (episodes_*.jsonl). Raw replays and Pokemon-distributed card/engine data are NOT included. Consumed offline by selfplay/merge_data.py + selfplay/train_value.py.
